docket_entries.description: NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2017, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. PETITIONER PRESENT IN COURT. PROOF OF PUBLICATION ON FILE.
